name: Yunnan Botanee Bio-Technology Group Co.LTD
summary: Yunnan Botanee Bio-Technology Group Co.LTD manufactures and sells skincare products in China. Its products type cover cleansers and makeup removers, face masks, toners, serums, moisturizers and creams, eye cream, sprays, sun care, foundations, and body cares. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Kunming, China.
